# Embr Visual Context
# Generated by visual-setup.sh on 2026-04-29T19:26:22Z
# Content reviewed against codebase 2026-04-29 — edit this file to update design context for all visual agents.

## Project

**App name:** Embr

---

## Design System

**CSS approach:** Tailwind CSS utilities plus global CSS custom properties and component classes in `design-system.css` (e.g. `.ui-card`, `.embr-header`).

**Token / style source files:** `apps/web/src/styles/design-system.css`, `apps/web/src/styles/globals.css`, `apps/web/tailwind.config.js`, `apps/web/src/theme/colorPalette.ts`

**Component library:** Custom / hand-rolled components (`.ui-*`, `.embr-*` patterns)

---

## Color

**Primary:** #c4977d (terracotta / `embr-primary-400`)

**Secondary:** #6ba898 (teal — focus rings, success)

**Background:** #fefdfb (`embr-neutral-50` / cream)

**Primary text:** #1a202c (`embr-accent-900`)

**Dark mode support:** No

**Dark mode implementation:** N/A

---

## Typography

**Approach:** Body font and base color on `body` in `design-system.css`; component-level font sizes/weights in the same file; Tailwind utilities in TSX where used.

**Body font:** Avenir Next, Segoe UI, sans-serif

**Display / heading font:** Same stack as body

---

## Spacing & Layout

**Spacing system:** Tailwind default scale plus named `theme.extend.spacing` steps (`xs` through `3xl` in `tailwind.config.js`); layout also uses explicit rem in CSS (cards, shell, nav).

**Border radius convention:** CSS variables: `--embr-radius-sm` 8px, `--embr-radius-md` 12px, `--embr-radius-lg` 16px, `--embr-radius-xl` 24px; full pills use `border-radius: 999px` (e.g. nav links).

---

## Audit Guidance

**Known visual debt:** Embr palette is defined in parallel in `design-system.css` `:root`, `tailwind.config.js` (`embr.*`), and `colorPalette.ts` — auditors should flag drift or consolidation opportunities.

**Definition of visually cohesive:** Consistent use of tokens, no one-off values, clear hierarchy.

---

## Agent Scope Reminder

All six visual agents (tokens, typography, layout, components, color, polish) should
treat this file as their Required Inputs context. When running a visual agent prompt
from a file that does not already embed it, paste the contents of this file into the
Required Inputs section before submitting. Prompts under `audits/prompts/visual-*.md`
embed the same text—update `audits/visual-context.md` first, then sync those files.
